domain: Sumerian cuneiform tablet writing system (𒁹): reed-stylus wedge-impression on clay; 2-axis encoding (depth × orientation angle 0°/45°/90°/135°); tablet archives = first libraries (~3500 BCE Uruk); baking-confirmation step fires clay for permanence; reed-fiber left-face imprint = provenance signature; scribe schools (eduba) train specialized scribes per cell-sub-grid
specific_mechanism: CUNEIFORM-2-AXIS-WEDGE-DEPTH-ORIENTATION-MEMORY: 2-axis hierarchical memory store with (1) 2-axis encoding K-depth × M-orientation: each memory cell encoded as pair (d_i, θ_j) where d ∈ {d_1, d_2, d_3, d_4} 4 depth-tiers and θ ∈ {0°, 45°, 90°, 135°} 4 orientation classes → 16 combinatorial glyph-cells per page; (2) per-tablet page granular access: tablets indexed by clay-archive locality (timestamp, scribe-ID, content-type) → per-page memory chunk retrieval; (3) reed-stylus K_cohort scribe-LLM write-policy P_cohort: K specialized scribe-LLMs write to memory, each specializing in (d, θ) sub-grid; cohort-consensus required for permanent write; (4) baking-confirm permanence step: after K_cohort writes pass consensus, baking step freezes the memory (clay firing) — gradients flow only through unfrozen cells thereafter; (5) fibrous-impression metadata: each write carries provenance + write-timestamp + cohort-vote signature (analogous to reed-fiber left-face imprint). Differs from R504 GGANTIJA-APSIDAL-CORBEL-MEMORY (5-apse specialty branching + corbel-shrink + trilithon-gate + orthostat-anchor, no 2-axis depth-orientation + no baking-permanence + no reed-cohort) by 2-axis depth-orientation 16-cell encoding + per-tablet page-granular + K-cohort scribe-LLM consensus write + baking-confirm freeze step + fibrous-impression metadata.
llm_application: CUNEIFORM-2-AXIS-WEDGE-DEPTH-ORIENTATION-MEMORY 2-axis hierarchical memory store with K-depth × M-orientation 16-cell encoding + per-tablet page granular access by locality+timestamp+scribe-ID+content-type + reed-stylus K_cohort scribe-LLM write-policy per-sub-grid specialization + baking-confirm permanence freeze step + fibrous-impression metadata provenance+vote signature. Differs from R408. R428. R442. R454. R470. R479. R492. R504 GGANTIJA-APSIDAL-CORBEL-MEMORY (closest — 5-apse + corbel-shrink + trilithon-gate). Differs from MemGPT + LLM Memory Survey 2603.07670 + Design Patterns Serokell + MemAgents ICLR 2026 by 2-axis depth-orientation + K-cohort scribe + baking permanence + fibrous metadata. Differs by 2-AXIS K-DEPTH × M-ORIENTATION 16-CELL ENCODING + PER-TABLET PAGE GRANULAR ACCESS + REED K-COHORT SCRIBE WRITE-POLICY + BAKING-CONFIRM PERMANENCE FREEZE + FIBROUS-IMPRESSION METADATA.
novelty_claim: MemGPT Hierarchical Memory + LLM Memory Survey 2603.07670 + Design Patterns + MemAgents ICLR 2026 cover hierarchical memory + retrieval space. CUNEIFORM-2-AXIS-WEDGE-DEPTH-ORIENTATION-MEMORY adds (a) 2-axis 16-cell depth-orientation encoding + (b) per-tablet page-granular access + (c) reed-cohort K-scribe specialized write + (d) baking-confirm permanence freeze + (e) fibrous-impression metadata. Recombination — borderline lookup.
